task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'scconfig' application window is open and visible on the screen.
The 'Bindings' tab or section is selected in the scconfig interface, displaying the network and station tree.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the target station GE.KWP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The station 'KWP' under the 'GE' network is visible and highlighted/selected in the station list.

task_completion.description: Remove or disable the scautopick binding for GE.KWP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'scautopick' module checkbox is unchecked, or its binding profile is removed/deleted in the configuration panel specifically for station GE.KWP.

task_completion.description: Ensure the control station GE.TOLI remains active
task_completion.visual_evidence: The station 'TOLI' under the 'GE' network is visible, and its 'scautopick' binding remains checked or active.
The 'Save' button is clicked, or a confirmation dialog/log message indicating the configuration has been saved is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the scconfig GUI to make changes rather than editing configuration files directly in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the graphical scconfig interface (checkboxes, menus) rather than terminal text editors like nano or vim.

integrity.description: The target station was not deleted from the inventory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Station GE.KWP is still visible in the station tree/inventory list; only its binding configuration was modified.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely navigated the GUI to accomplish the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A logical sequence of expanding the network tree, selecting stations, and modifying bindings is shown across the screenshots, rather than jumping inexplicably to a final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target station to disable: GE.KWP. Control station that must remain active: GE.TOLI. Target module: scautopick. The expected GUI application is 'scconfig'. The VLM should verify that the scautopick binding for GE.KWP is removed via the GUI while GE.TOLI's binding remains intact.
